author: @NorthernKitty
text: "Developed over years, like a really fine wine"... LOL!!  I hope you don't mind if I borrow that line?!  I have several "really fine wines" I've been aging. 😋  I kept waiting for the word "awesome" to be in your poem somewhere.  Maybe, "let me look for a wrench, I know I just saw some... oh, here we are, my best spanner!! That's awesome!!" 😁  I'll add this poem to the stack of other wonderful gifts you've given us this year... (I really do need more space in this house!!!)  🥰  HAPPY HOLIDAYS TO ALL!!!

author: @harveybaumgardner2890
text:
To FWG
We looked for ST. Nick as he flew overhead seeing him working to keep the gasifier feed and checking the welds to make sure that they held tight. Happy with the work FWG had done that night. He being Laughing and started to hum as he came low to start his run. But, what he heard was voices singing as one  " Don't worry ST. Nick, you may be a big man, but Robert said it will work, So you'll in good hands" and if you fly back by FWG and  happen to see Steve, Robert, Luke and all the rest just tell them that the States wish them the best.

author: @arb261268

author: @MrAnderson4509
text:
A Merry Christmas to you Robert -
Yes you are quite a gent, your poem was great!  It was time well spent-
I am so glad you helped Santa After all he has done, his smashed sleigh could have ruined all of the fun-
With that machine that makes gas, I'm not sure just what you did, but I'm sure o'l Santa's smile was just like a kid, with his joy boiling over, and Santa back in the air, I am certain it will continue to work out as a well good repair....

Please make a video with the rebuild of Santa's sleigh, including all the mods like the over load booster, or better yet the new and improved graphene based super conducting flux capacitor,    with perhaps a built in charge deployed emergancy air bag system to guard against future mishaps involving reindeer face plants.... poor Rudolf, that must have really hurt having gotten the wind knocked out like that...

author: @dremaboy777
text:
Awww... So sweet.

Amazing, how the technology of YouTube expands ones social horizon.  And genuine friends can be made, even as far as the other end of the earth; yet... they can stick closer than the screen of their device. 

Your existence has truly enriched my life Rob. With countless smiles, and an increase joy of living. 
And, I think it would be foolish to think I speak for myself.

Blessed be the day He was born (Or... merry Christmas).
